PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Nov-06-2007 is admitted to probate. Tiffany G. Melvin is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jun-12-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
